high_conviction.name: Butterfly Network
high_conviction.catalyst: Midjourney $74M avtal for full-body ultraljudsskanner med 40 Butterfly-moduler. NYSE toppresterare 2 dagar. Short interest 10%, 4.9 days-to-cover.

high_conviction.name: QuantumScape
high_conviction.catalyst: Honda solid-state-batteri-avtal. JB Straubel (Tesla-medgrundare) pa advisory board. EV-sektortrend.

high_conviction.name: Domo Inc
high_conviction.catalyst: Avancerade forhandlingar om buyout/strategisk transaktion. RPD Fund kopte 11.97% for $42.5M. P/S under 0.5x for SaaS-bolag. Buyout-besked kan komma nar som helst.

high_conviction.name: Hyperfine
high_conviction.catalyst: Russell 2000/3000-inklusion effektiv 26-27 juni. Indexfonder maste kopa. 6.4x snittvolym tyder pa att ackumuleringen borjat. FDA-godkand portabel MRI.

speculative.name: CervoMed
speculative.catalyst: Vertex Pharmaceuticals-grundare koper 955K aktier for $3M. FDA-alignment pa Phase 3 for neflamapimod. $10.5M placement sakrar cash till Q2 2027.

speculative.name: Solid Biosciences
speculative.catalyst: Nara 52v-high $8.87, breakout-trade. Phase 3 IMPACT DUCHENNE doserad. H.C. Wainwright PT $25. 8.1x snittvolym.

speculative.name: Asia Pacific Wire & Cable
speculative.catalyst: Extremt undervarderad: $489.7M revenue vs $35M market cap (0.07x P/S). Bokfort varde $8.26/aktie. $33M cash. 62x snittvolym.

speculative.name: JetBlue Airways
speculative.catalyst: Hojd Q2-intaktsguidance (RASM +9-12% YoY). 99.8% completion factor. Spirit-rutter expansion. Turnaround-story.

avoid.reason: Negativ equity, $0.63M omsattning, +205% pa en vecka, pump-risk

verification.success_criteria: Target 1 natt = framgang. Stop-loss traffad = misslyckad.
